  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Seal purged from over-greasing — seal integrity compromised and bearing housing contaminated",
    "Installed-defective condition: purged seal cannot retain lubricant or exclude contaminants",
    "Sequence violation: lubrication quantity exceeded before verification of seal condition and packing clearance"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop lubrication work immediately",
    "Remove purged/damaged seal and inspect bearing cavity for grease ingress and contamination",
    "Clean bearing housing and bore; verify bearing condition before reassembly",
    "Install replacement seal per SKF/Timken mounting procedure",
    "Re-grease to specified fill quantity only — confirm relief path and seal seating before pressurizing"
  ],
  "rationale": "A purged seal from over-greasing is an installed-defective condition: the seal has been displaced or damaged and can no longer function. Per SKF/Timken mounting guides, seal integrity must be established and maintained before final lubrication. Work cannot continue until the seal is replaced, the housing is decontaminated, and grease quantity is controlled to specification.",
  "references": ["SKF bearing mounting guide — seal installation and lubrication quantity", "Timken installation manual — seal handling and grease fill limits"]
}
